expectations.text: Suggests re-running `claude plugin marketplace update ram-companies` to refresh the local catalog
expectations.evidence: Gives that exact command as a way to rule out a stale catalog.

expectations.text: Suggests checking whether the version bump in `plugin.json` has actually been merged to `main` yet
expectations.evidence: Actually checked `main`'s plugin.json directly and found it's still at 1.4.1 — the 1.4.3 bump only exists on `feature/formatting`.

expectations.text: Does not conclude the update command is broken without first ruling out these two causes
expectations.evidence: Explicitly concludes 'claude plugin update is behaving correctly' and 'no mistake on your end'.
